provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against codex. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text: ast-grep is tree-sitter-based and language-agnostic via language packs; Comby is parser-agnostic and uses a custom syntactic matcher. Both target structural search and rewrite, but ast-grep emphasises a YAML rule format and CI integration while Comby leans on its own DSL.
